creator: dnelson@allantgroup.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #13)

Weird. I must be doing something wrong.  I click the [Details] link next to the attachment, change the dropdown on the maintainer‑approval line from "?" to "+", click [Submit].  But the attachment stays at "maintainer-approval?".  I was able to set maintainer-approval+ on Attachment #155866 , though (possibly because I had created that attachment?)
